steps.title: BCD
steps.prompt: Verify BCD fits and inflates/deflates correctly.

steps.title: Weights
steps.prompt: Verify weight amount and secure attachment.

steps.title: Releases
steps.prompt: Verify all releases — BCD, weight system, drysuit if applicable.

steps.title: Air
steps.prompt: Verify air is on, tank is full, breathe from regulator.

steps.title: Final OK
steps.prompt: Complete final buddy review together before entering the water.
